result.stderr:
CodeCoverageSummary 1.3.0+f13848964841ca2f7a63343b287493e17dc645de
Copyright © 2021 - 2022 Taranis Software

  --files             Required. A comma separated list of code coverage files to
                      analyse. Also accepts glob patterns.

  --badge             (Default: false) Include a Line Rate coverage badge in the
                      output using shields.io - true or false.

  --fail              (Default: false) Fail if overall Line Rate below lower
                      threshold - true or false.

  --format            (Default: text) Output Format - markdown or text.

  --hidebranch        (Default: false) Hide Branch Rate values in the output -
                      true or false.

  --hidecomplexity    (Default: false) Hide Complexity values in the output -
                      true or false.

  --indicators        (Default: true) Include health indicators in the output -
                      true or false.

  --output            (Default: console) Output Type - console, file or both.

  --thresholds        (Default: 50 75) Threshold percentages for badge and
                      health indicators, lower threshold can also be used to
                      fail the action.

  --help              Display this help screen.

  --version           Display version information.

CodeCoverageSummary 1.3.0+f13848964841ca2f7a63343b287493e17dc645de
Copyright © 2021 - 2022 Taranis Software

  --files             Required. A comma separated list of code coverage files to
                      analyse. Also accepts glob patterns.

  --badge             (Default: false) Include a Line Rate coverage badge in the
                      output using shields.io - true or false.

  --fail              (Default: false) Fail if overall Line Rate below lower
                      threshold - true or false.

  --format            (Default: text) Output Format - markdown or text.

  --hidebranch        (Default: false) Hide Branch Rate values in the output -

  --hidecomplexity    (Default: false) Hide Complexity values in the output -

  --indicators        (Default: true) Include health indicators in the output -

options.description: A comma separated list of code coverage files to analyse. Also accepts glob patterns.
Include a Line Rate coverage badge in the output using shields.io - true or false.
Fail if overall Line Rate below lower threshold - true or false.
Hide Branch Rate values in the output - true or false.
Hide Complexity values in the output - true or false.
Include health indicators in the output - true or false.
Output Type - console, file or both.
Threshold percentages for badge and health indicators, lower threshold can also be used to fail the action.
